C/C FOR TRIAL BY JURY IN DEPT P002, OMARIE-VICTOIRE, JUDGE; MMANZELLA, CLERK; DCHEN, CSR. PRIOR TO TRIAL COMMENCING, SETTLEMENT IS REACHED, TO WIT: PLAINTIFF ALSON Y LEE SHALL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACK RAY POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AT 611 MINNA STREET #12, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND FEES. MR. RAY TO PAY ONE-HALF MONTHS RENT IN AMOUNT OF $337.73 FOR TOTAL MONEY JUDGMENT OF $2364.07 FROM APRIL 1, 2000 TO MID-JULY 2000; JUDGMENT WILL NOT BE ENTERED; PAYMENT DUE ON JUL 21, 2000 BY 5:00 P.M. IN CERTIFIED FUNDS OR CASH. DEFENDANT MAY MAINTAIN POSSESSION OF PREMISES UNTIL 5 P.M, AUG 2, 2000. IF NO PAYMENTS MADE, JUDGMENT MAY BE ENTERED. IF DEFENDANT HAS NOT VACATED PREMISES BY AUG 2, 2000, COUNSEL MAY SEEK IMMEDIATE ENTRY OF JUDGMENT WITHOUT STAY.MUTUAL 1542 RELEASE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KARLTON, KARLYRE RAY, JACK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 611 MINNA STREET #12, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF ALSON Y. LEE IS AWARDED JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KARLYRE KARLTON ONLY OF $2133 AND AS TO DEFENDANTS KARLYRE KARLTON AND JACK RAY, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY, OF $2360 FOR A TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $4493. COLLECTION OF MONEY JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT JACK RAY IS ORDERED STAYED THROUGH 2 FEB 2001.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
